title: Better Eggs
description: A mod that makes eggs more functional, allowing them to be boiled and fried
body:
In this mod, you can cook and eat eggs in various ways, making eggs a more useful and exciting food item in Minecraft! There are two primary methods for preparing eggs: boiling and frying.


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-EoCPoPTf_g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


# Boiling Eggs:

To boil an egg, place a Raw Egg in a campfire or furnace. After the egg is cooked, you’ll receive a Boiled Egg that restores 4 Hunger bars and leaves its Egg Shell when eaten.

## Steps to Boil an Egg:
1. Place a Raw Egg in a furnace.
2. Wait until the Raw Egg cooks, transforming into a Boiled Egg.
3. Eat the Boiled Egg to restore 4 Hunger bars.



# Frying Eggs:
To fry an egg, you will need a Frying Pan. After crafting the Frying Pan, to crack your egg and pour it into the pan, craft using the recipe in Image 3 and you’ll obtain the Egg On Pan item.

Cook the Egg On Pan in a furnace until it turns into a Fried Egg On Pan. Eating this Fried Egg On Pan restores 5 Hunger bars and, once eaten, you’ll get back the Frying Pan item that is empty.

## Steps to Fry an Egg:
1. Craft a Frying Pan.
2. Craft as in the image below to crack an egg and pour it into the pan, transforming it to Egg On Pan item.
3. Cook the Egg On Pan in a furnace until it turns into a Fried Egg On Pan.
4. Eat the Fried Egg On Pan to restore 5 Hunger bars. Once eaten, the Frying Pan item will be returned to your inventory.
